## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on Kalil's pipeline performance and editing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Kalil's workflow is efficient (15–45 min/article),** meeting the Q1 goal of \<30 mins. The main bottleneck is the substantive edit, which consumes \~50% of the time.
  - [**The primary issue is AI hallucinating broken links,** requiring manual verification. A future Atlas feature will automate this by using client edits to self-improve pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**High edit times (\>1.5 hrs) signal a pipeline failure,** not a need for more manual effort. The correct action is to debug the pipeline (instructions, artifacts) or file an engineering ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**The long-term goal is for operators to manage 4+ clients,** enabled by Atlas automating context engineering to eliminate the current artifact-juggling bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Performance & Editing Workflow

  - [**Current Performance:** Kalil's workflow is efficient, with edits taking 15–45 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [**Substantive Edit (50% of time):** The main bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
          - [**Process:** Reblocking → SEO check → Fact check → Manual review.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - [**Wait Time:** 5–10 minutes spent waiting for Atlas to process edits.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [**Copy Edit (5–10% of time):** Quick final polish.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [**Primary Bottleneck: Link Hallucinations**](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [**Problem:** Atlas generates broken links, requiring manual verification of every link.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [**Current Fix:** Manually update an internal link repository weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [**Desired Fix:** An automated SERP search function to validate links.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### The Problem of High Edit Times

  - [**Performance Tiers:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - **Green (\<30 min):** Efficient and scalable.
      - [**Red (\>1.5 hrs):** Signals a pipeline failure.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Why High Edit Times Are Inefficient:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [Editing poor LLM output is like untangling a "spaghetti mess" because the editor doesn't know the AI's logic.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [This is less efficient than rewriting the article from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [**Root Causes of High Edit Times:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Process Failure:** An operator edits poor output instead of debugging the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Architectural Failure:** Conflicting instructions or flawed artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [**Corrective Action:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**Test Pipeline Variations:** Run the pipeline with different instructions (detailed, stripped-down) to find the optimal configuration.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**File Engineering Tickets:** Aggressively report pipeline issues to improve the product for everyone.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)

### The Solution: Automated Context Engineering

  - [**Current Bottleneck:** Manual "artifact juggling" (e.g., updating client messaging) is time-consuming and error-prone.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Future Atlas Feature:** Automate context engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Atlas will analyze client edits and feedback to automatically update pipeline artifacts (e.g., writing guidelines, company context).](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Eliminates manual artifact management, freeing operators to focus on higher-value work.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [Continue documenting pipeline issues to identify patterns for future optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [File engineering tickets for recurring problems to improve the product.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Monitor Time Doctor data to identify and address pipeline performance issues across the team.](https://fathom.video/share/TnymjxYeQfkjbYz-cu5vFYoYoMUKBG_R?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
